zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Harding於1349年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德比阿德爾時，他的父親Henry de Harding45歲，母親Alice Horton39歲。他於大約1364年與Lucia在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年5月在英國達勒姆享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Harding于1349年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德比阿德爾时，他的父亲Henry de Harding45岁，母亲Alice Horton39岁。他于大约1364年与Lucia在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年5月在英国達勒姆享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Harding was born in 1349, in Beadnell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Harding, was 45 and his mother, Alice Horton, was 39. He married Lucia about 1364, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in May 1414, in Durham, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Harding est né en 1349, à Beadnell, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Harding, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Horton, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Lucia environ 1364, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1414, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Harding 1349 in Beadnell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Harding 45 und seine Mutter Alice Horton 39. Er hat um 1364 in Durham, England Lucia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1414 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Durham, England und wurde in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lucia circa 1364, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Hardingが1349年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドビードネルで生まれた時，父Henry de Hardingは45歳，母Alice Hortonは39歳であった。約1364年にイギリスダルハムでLuciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年5月にイギリスダルハムで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムダルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Harding(이)가 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브이드넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Harding(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Horton(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1364년 영국 뒤람에서 Lucia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 5월 영국 뒤람에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Harding nasceu em 1349, em Beadnell, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Harding, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Horton, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia aproximadamente 1364, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Harding родился в 1349 г. в местности биднелл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Harding было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Horton, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia около 1364 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер май 1414 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности дурам, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.
